name: Kurnoth's Heralds
inspire: After an Action step, if a friendly fighter began that Action step in friendly territory and then made a successful Attack, Inspire that fighter.

reactions.name: The Endless Hunt
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after a friendly fighter has Attacked.
reactions.flavorText: Kurnoth's faithful rarely slow and never stand still, for the hunt never ends.
reactions.rulesText: Use this immediately after a friendly fighter has Attacked. You can push the attacker up to 2 hexes. You can only use this ability once per game.

reactions.name: Precision Volley
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after a friendly Lenwythe's ranged Attack.
reactions.flavorText: Some of the greatest archers in the realms reside within Kurnotheal, and Lenwythe can outshoot most of them.
reactions.rulesText: Use this immediately after a friendly Lenwythe's ranged Attack. That fighter Attacks again using the same weapon. You can only use this ability once per game.

reactions.name: Herald's Pride
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after you pick a weapon as part of your leader's {icon:leader} Attack.
reactions.flavorText: Ylarin has the arrogance of a warrior born, but few that have witnessed his martial prowess would deny his glory.
reactions.rulesText: Use this immediately after you pick a weapon as part of your leader's {icon:leader} Attack. That weapon has Cleave ({icon:cleave}) and Ensnare ({icon:ensnare}) for that Attack. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Swift Sentinels
abilities.flavorText: Perfectly attuned to the Hunter's Paradise, Kurnoth's Heralds run circles around intruders who dare stray into their territory.
abilities.rulesText: While they are in friendly territory, friendly fighters have the Flying ({icon:hex}) runemark and cannot be Flanked (they can still be Surrounded).
